title: Go Chase Yourself
writer: Paul Yawitz, Bert Granet, Walter O'Keefe
actors: Joe Penner, Lucille Ball, Richard Lane
plot: When the First Union National Bank of Williamstown is robbed, the three bank robbers get away by hitching their car to Wilbur's trailer. When the police find part of Wilbur's coat in front of the open safe, they suspect bank telle...
